title: INSERT reports error
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 BIGINT  AUTO_INCREMENT , c1 NUMERIC UNSIGNED ZEROFILL , c2 BOOL UNSIGNED );

INSERT IGNORE  INTO t0 VALUES ('0.15420096597665933', 0.9090047475498639, true), (9223372036854775807, NULL, 525639594) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE c2=false;
```

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

INSERT executed successfully

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```sql
ERROR 1467 (HY000): Failed to read auto-increment value from storage engine
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
·``sql
Release Version: v9.0.0-beta.1.pre-640-g24903d6b24
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 24903d6b24674b9a43625ac2d05bf1b033b04407
Git Branch: master
UTC Build Time: 2025-04-27 01:17:32
GoVersion: go1.23.8
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv
```

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
CREATE TABLE t2(id INTEGER, ref_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES t1(id));
UPDATE t2 SET ref_id = 3 WHERE ref_id NOT IN (1, 2);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE value IS NULL OR created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
key_bug_features: INSERT IGNORE with ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE fails
